mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_addresses (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_addresses (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.receiverName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.receiverMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.province, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.city, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.district, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.detailAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isDefault, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_addresses WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM client_addresses WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_addresses SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE client_addresses SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
